claim: Tier 7.4b implemented the local cost-aware policy/action diagnostic from the Tier 7.4a contract. Across three task families and seeds 42/43/44, the v2.3 cost-aware policy ranked first among non-oracle models, beat fixed/trivial/online external baselines by expected utility, separated shams and ablations, and avoided no-action collapse.
caveat: Local software diagnostic only; candidate mechanism evidence, not a promoted mechanism, not public usefulness proof, not a baseline freeze, not hardware/native transfer, and not AGI/ASI evidence. The next gate is compact promotion/regression before any freeze.
